user.title: Connect to Västtrafik
user.description: Get your credentials from [developer.vasttrafik.se](https://developer.vasttrafik.se) → My Applications → create an app → copy the key and secret.

data_description.secret: Stored securely and never shown again

start_stop.title: Where do you board?
start_stop.description:
Enter the name of your boarding stop. If multiple matches are found you will be shown a list to pick from.

Example: {example}

data_description.stop_name: You can use city name for precision, e.g. 'Brunnsparken, Göteborg'

end_stop.title: Where are you going? (optional)
end_stop.description:
Adding a destination filters the line list to only lines that go there, and auto-selects the direction. Leave blank to see all lines from **{start}**.

Example: {example}

pick_stop.title: Multiple stops found
pick_stop.description: Your search matched more than one stop. Select the correct one.

pick_line.title: Which line?
pick_line.description: Lines currently departing from **{stop}**. Select the line you want to track.

line_manual.title: Enter the line name
line_manual.description: No live departures found at **{stop}** right now. Enter the line short name (e.g. `16`, `Röd`, `V1`).

pick_direction.title: Which direction?
pick_direction.description: Filter line **{line}** from **{stop}** to a specific end destination, or choose any direction.

line_options.title: All set!
line_options.description:
**Line {line}** from **{stop}** → **{direction}**

Three entities will be created automatically:
- 🕐  **Departure time** — next bus with realtime delay and platform
- ⚠️  **Störning** — live service disruption alerts
- 📍  **Position** — vehicle location on the map (interpolated, updated every 30 s)

data_description.delay: Show departures at least this many minutes in the future — set this to your walk time.
data_description.name: Prefix used for all three entities. Leave blank to use the auto-generated name.

error.auth: Authentication failed — check your API key and secret.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Västtrafik API. Check your connection.
error.station_not_found: No stop found. Try adding the city, e.g. 'Brunnsparken, Göteborg'.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred — check the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: Västtrafik is already configured. Use the ⚙️ button to add more lines.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Västtrafik integration is supported.

line_manual.title: Enter line name
line_manual.description: No live departures at **{stop}**. Enter the line short name.

remove.title: Remove monitored lines
remove.description: Tick the lines you want to **keep**. Unticked ones will be removed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Västtrafik API.
error.station_not_found: No stop found. Try adding the city name.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred — check the HA log for details.
